preconditions: args must be a tuple of arguments
kwargs must be a dictionary of keyword arguments
postconditions: any exception raised by obj(*args, **kwargs) is propagated

preconditions: args must be a sequence of positional arguments
kwargs must be a dictionary of keyword arguments
edge_cases: if obj is None, raises TypeError
if obj is not callable, raises TypeError
if args is not a sequence, raises TypeError
if kwargs is not a dictionary, raises TypeError

agreed.groq: args must be a tuple of arguments
agreed.hf: args must be a sequence of positional arguments

agreed.groq: kwargs must be a dictionary of keyword arguments
agreed.hf: kwargs must be a dictionary of keyword arguments

groq_only: any exception raised by obj(*args, **kwargs) is propagated

hf_only: if obj is None, raises TypeError
if obj is not callable, raises TypeError
if args is not a sequence, raises TypeError
if kwargs is not a dictionary, raises TypeError
